subject: fix(implementations): clarify source adaptations after verification
body:
Spot-checked 12 code patterns against their source repos. Three docs
needed clarification where the reference pattern adapts the source:

- BURGER_MENU.md: Note that useDisclosureFocus simplifies canva-grid's
  options-object API to positional args
- THEME_DARK_MODE.md: Note that synctone separates store and hydration
  into different files, shown combined here for clarity
- HTTPS_PROXY.md: Document that maxRetries semantics differ from
  few-lap's "total attempts" parameter (same delays, different count)

No functional code changes — all patterns verified correct.

Tags: documentation, verification, implementations
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pattern-alignment
Semver: patch
